_comment: MT-113 portable non-SQLite fixture corpus: append-only pose context state switches + multi-rig workspace tab/panel state. Pure JSON, no SQLite. workspace_ref_slug / session_ref_slug made run-unique by the loader. context_modes drive set_pose_context_state in order (blank -> single_image -> character_linked -> collection_linked); each switch is append-only and must preserve prior modes. workspace_tabs drive upsert_pose_workspace_rig_state and assert sort_order / single-active invariants.
